_source: ILO Future of Work LMIC adjustment + ITU Digital Development Report 2024 - Bangladesh automation calibration multiplier. Higher than Ghana because (a) RMG manufacturing sector has stronger automation pressure, (b) BPO/ICT exports are deeper into global automation supply chains.
rationale: Multipliers reflect ILO finding that Bangladesh's export-oriented RMG and BPO sectors face automation pressure closer to OECD baseline, while informal-economy sectors retain LMIC dampening.
